name: Dagon
description: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.name: Energy Burst
abilities.description: Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit, dealing great damage. Cooldown: 27/24/21/18/15. Mana Cost: 120/140/160/180/200. Cast Range: 640. Damage: 400/500/600/700/800.
